command:
uv run python -c 
import urllib.request
import os

url = 'https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC3265025/pdf/nihms349434.pdf'
out_path = 'tasks/t0002_literature_survey_dsgc_compartmental_models/assets/paper/10.1002_cne.22678/files/hoshi_2011_on-dsgc.pdf'

headers = {
    'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; research-bot/1.0; mailto:a.nikolaev@sheffield.ac.uk)'
}

req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers=headers)
with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=30) as response:
    data = response.read()

with open(out_path, 'wb') as f:
    f.write(data)

size = os.path.getsize(out_path)
print(f'Downloaded: {out_path}')
print(f'Size: {size} bytes ({size/1024:.1f} KB)')

# Check PDF magic bytes
with open(out_path, 'rb') as f:
    header = f.read(5)
print(f'PDF header: {header}')
print(f'Valid PDF: {header == b"%PDF-"}')
